assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly discusses Istio version compatibility with GKE 1.32, states Istio 1.19+ supports GKE 1.32, and warns about upgrading Istio first if on version <1.19

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands to check current Istio version and references the official Istio compatibility matrix URL for GKE platform setup

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'If your Istio version doesn't support GKE 1.32' then provides specific Phase 1 instructions to upgrade Istio control plane first before GKE upgrade

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response addresses admission webhook failures as the most common issue, provides specific kubectl commands to check webhook status, and includes mitigation steps for webhook rejection problems

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response includes validation checklist item 'Sidecar injection working on new pods' and provides commands to check for pods without istio-proxy sidecars during monitoring

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands to check Envoy versions across the fleet and addresses Envoy version compatibility as a specific gotcha with symptoms and fixes

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response provides multiple specific commands including 'kubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app=istiod', 'istioctl proxy-status', and watch commands for monitoring proxy sync status

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Response explicitly warns 'Never upgrade GKE control plane and Istio simultaneously. This is the #1 cause of mesh breakage' and mentions traffic disruption risks throughout the upgrade process
